data.title: USDC Treasury Burns 50 Million Tokens on Ethereum
data.description: According to PANews, Whale Alert reported that at 21:27 UTC+8, the USDC Treasury destroyed 50 million USDC tokens on the Ethereum blockchain.

data.title: White House Crypto and AI Chief to Speak at Bitcoin 2025 Conference
data.description: According to Odaily, White House official David Sacks, who oversees cryptocurrency and artificial intelligence, is scheduled to attend the Bitcoin 2025 Conference next month. Sacks will deliver a speech at the event, highlighting the growing intersection of digital currencies and AI technologies.

data.title: Coinbase: Preparations have begun to support the Ethereum Pectra upgrade, and necessary updates will be implemented after it goes online
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinbase posted on its official blog that Ethereum's next major upgrade is coming. Due to configuration issues during the activation of the Holesky and Sepolia test networks, the Pectra upgrade has been delayed and is currently scheduled to be launched on the main network on May 7. Coinbase has begun actively preparing for the upgrade and will implement necessary updates after Pectra is officially launched. In addition, Coinbase also stated that it will continue to pay close attention to the preparations for system updates and actively work to ensure that customers have a smooth online experience.

data.title: Former Bank Employee Sentenced to 20 Years for Embezzlement and Cryptocurrency Investment
data.description: According to Foresight News, a former employee of Woori Bank has been sentenced to 20 years in prison for embezzling 17.7 billion won (approximately 11.98 million USD) in customer loans. The individual invested the majority of the embezzled funds in virtual currencies. The appeal trial is scheduled for May 14.

data.title: EU votes to impose 25% tariffs on US in retaliation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On April 9 local time, 27 EU member states voted to pass countermeasures to impose a 25% tariff on US imports in retaliation for the Trump administration's announcement on March 12 to impose tariffs on EU steel and aluminum. (Jinshi)

data.title: BlackRock deposited 3,296 BTC worth about $254 million to Coinbase Prime 2 hours ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, BlackRock deposited 3,296 BTC worth approximately US$254 million to the Coinbase Prime Deposit marked address 2 hours ago.

data.title: Gate.io Launches Babylon(BABY) Spot Trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io will launch Babylon (BABY) spot trading at 18:00 (UTC+8) on April 10.

data.title: Bitwise CIO: Tariff storm may be good for BTC, maintains price target of $200,000 by the end of the year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitwise Chief Investment Officer Matt Hougan expects the tariff storm to be good for Bitcoin because the trade war will weaken the dollar's reserve currency status and stimulate demand for "hard currencies" such as Bitcoin. Despite escalating tensions, the asset management company still maintains its year-end BTC price target of $200,000. (The Block)

data.title: EU approves tariffs on 21 billion euros worth of U.S. goods
data.description: The EU approved additional tariffs on 21 billion euros of US goods in response to the metal dispute. (Jinshi)

data.title: EU: If a fair deal is reached with the United States, counter-tariffs can be suspended
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The European Commission said it will take the first batch of countermeasures against US tariffs on April 15. The EU said it could suspend counter-tariffs if a fair deal is reached with the United States. (Jinshi)
